parsed.clarification_question: Which focus should I apply to this paragraph? A) Writing polish and clarity (R1.6), B) Conceptual/argument-level feedback on thesis and logic (R1.1–R1.2), or C) Novelty and claim-strength review around “first”/“binding” language (R1.4 with RX.2)?

rationale.R1.1: Conceptual reframing may be needed to sharpen the thesis and contribution claim of the framework.
rationale.R1.2: The paragraph advances a multi-step argument (why DPSR matters vs RMSE) that warrants a consistency check.
rationale.R1.6: The user may be asking for sentence-level clarity, flow, and concision improvements.
rationale.RX.1: Ambiguity in the request and limited context require explicitly noting uncertainties in any feedback focus.
rationale.RX.2: Claims like “first” and “binding” risk overstatement and should be handled cautiously.
rationale.RX.3: The response must stay within assessing this paragraph rather than the full paper or experiments.
rationale.RX.4: Feedback should avoid encouraging misleading interpretations of climate evaluation results.
rationale.RX.5: Any judgments should be traceable to the provided text without external speculation.
